sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72064" key="o)dontismo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀδοντ-ισμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, a mode of playing the flute, in which the <sense id="n72064.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">gnashing of the teeth</tr_> of the serpent Pytho was imitated, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:4:80" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.80</biblScope></bibl>,<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:84" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">84</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
